scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
